title: Santoria Pack Public
description: The Santoria Network public resource pack
body:
# Santoria Network Publick Pack

This resource pack is a public version of the resource pack used on the [Santoria Netwok](https://santoria.net/).

The pack will not exactly look like what you see on the server, its a simplified version that doesn't have any of the custom items that you can use anywhere while keeping the Santoria look of things!

Some of the features of the resource pack where not made by us you can find a list of credits [over here](https://wiki.santoria.net/en/Nations/Resourcepack).
